nasb.text: Then Samuel said to the people, “It is the Lord who appointed Moses and Aaron and who brought your fathers up from the land of Egypt.

esv.text: And Samuel said to the people, “The Lord is witness, who appointed Moses and Aaron and brought your fathers up out of the land of Egypt.

cnv.text: 撒母耳對人民說：“從前選立摩西和亞倫，又把你們的列祖從埃及地領上來的，是耶和華。

ccb.text: 撒母耳继续说：“是耶和华派摩西和亚伦带领你们的祖先离开埃及。
